interactions.final_answer:
### 1. SCOPE CONFIG - **Scope name**: JPMorgan Chase Global Workspace - **Description**: Central hub for firm-wide updates, line-of-business insights, leadership guidance, and compliance resources to support our Fortress Balance Sheet philosophy and daily operations across 100+ countries. - **Welcome message**: Welcome to the JPMorgan Chase Global Workspace — your source for CIB deal flow, CCB customer insights, risk management updates, and Jamie Dimon's strategic direction as we manage $4 trillion in assets and process $10 trillion in daily payments. - **image_url**: jp/logo.png - **primary_color**: #003B7A - **primary_color_contrast**: #FFFFFF - **secondary_color**: #117ACA - **warn_color**: #C8102E - **warn_color_contrast**: #FFFFFF - **number_of_highlights**: 4 - **highlights_carousel**: true - **highlights_style**: BannerCarousel - **Footer** (3 columns): - Column 1: **Company** – About (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about), Careers (https://careers.jpmorgan.com), Investor Relations (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir) - Column 2: **Locations** – New York HQ (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/locations), London (https://www.jpmorgan.com/country/GB/en), APAC Hubs (https://www.jpmorgan.com/country/SG/en) - Column 3: **Resources** – Newsroom (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories), ESG/Sustainability (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/impact), Annual Report (https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report) - **Social links**: facebookLink=null, twitterLink=https://twitter.com/jpmorgan, linkedInLink=https://linkedin.com/company/jpmorgan-chase, instagramLink=null, youtubeLink=https://youtube.com/jpmorgan - **navigation_links**: - topBarLinks: [{"caption": "Careers", "link": "https://careers.jpmorgan.com"}, {"caption": "Investor Relations", "link": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir"}, {"caption": "Newsroom", "link": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories"}] - footerLinks: [{"caption": "JPMorgan.com", "link": "https://www.jpmorgan.com"}, {"caption": "Chase.com", "link": "https://www.chase.com"}, {"caption": "Asset Management", "link": "https://am.jpmorgan.com"}, {"caption": "Private Bank", "link": "https://privatebank.jpmorgan.com"}, {"caption": "Onyx", "link": "https://www.jpmorgan.com/onyx"}] - socialLinks: as above ### 2. CHANNEL ARCHITECTURE (5 channels) **PRIMARY channels** (Ch1-Ch3: sticky=True, hide_highlights=False, core visibility on homepage feed). - **Ch1: CIB Markets & Deals** (PRIMARY) - Purpose: Updates on investment banking mandates, markets performance, league tables, and client coverage wins in Corporate & Investment Bank. - Type: public - Color: #003B7A - is_sticky: true - image_url: jp/stock_market.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: false - hide_highlights: false - Description:

The Corporate & Investment Bank (CIB) drives global deal flow with #1 rankings in M&A advisory, FX trading, and fixed income. FY2024 revenue: ~$59B.

Track league table performance, coverage banker insights, and transaction tombstones here.

Content reviewed for information barriers.

- Tabs: ["Articles"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: Reader - FAQ: [] (pure broadcast) - **Ch2: Chase Consumer Banking** (PRIMARY) - Purpose: Insights into CCB's 86M customers, branch network, credit card growth, and retail innovations like Sapphire Reserve. - Type: public - Color: #117ACA - is_sticky: true - image_url: jp/credit_card.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: false - hide_highlights: false - Description:

Consumer & Community Banking (CCB) serves ~86M customers via 4,900 branches and Chase.com, with FY2024 revenue of ~$60B.

Largest US credit card issuer by outstandings; focus on mortgages, auto loans, and small business.

Customer-first updates for retail teams.

- Tabs: ["Articles"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: Reader - FAQ: [] (pure broadcast) - **Ch3: Leadership Voice** (PRIMARY) - Purpose: Jamie Dimon's annual letters, CEO memos, MD promotions, and firm-wide strategy from the Chairman & CEO. - Type: corporate - Color: #003B7A - is_sticky: true - image_url: jp/leadership_speech.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: false - hide_highlights: false - Description:

Direct from Jamie Dimon: Fortress Balance Sheet philosophy, geopolitical insights, and annual shareholder letters that set the firm's tone.

~316,000 employees worldwide align here on capital strength ($4T assets) and risk discipline.

Restricted access for strategic alignment.

- Tabs: ["Articles"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: None - FAQ: [{"question": "How does the annual letter influence firm strategy?", "answer": "Dimon's letters outline economic views, regulatory stances, and priorities like CET1 targets above regulatory minimums."}, {"question": "Where to find MD promotion details?", "answer": "Announced here; global committee reviews for 42 countries."}] **SECONDARY channels** (Ch4-Ch5: sticky=False, lower visibility). - **Ch4: Compliance & Risk** (SECONDARY) - Purpose: Mandatory policies like Information Barriers, regulatory updates, stress tests, and risk management (credit, market, liquidity). - Type: corporate - Color: #C8102E - is_sticky: false - image_url: jp/law.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: true - hide_highlights: true - Description:

Firm-wide compliance obligations, Chinese Walls (information barriers), and risk framework independent of lines of business.

CRO reports to CEO/Board; covers MNPI handling, annual training, and regulatory exams (OCC, Fed, FDIC).

All employees: complete acknowledgements here.

- Tabs: ["Articles", "Pages"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: None - FAQ: [{"question": "What are Information Barriers?", "answer": "Strict separations preventing MNPI sharing between IB and trading/research; violations lead to termination."}, {"question": "Who approves wall crossings?", "answer": "Legal/Compliance team only; consult before any communication."}, {"question": "What risks does the firm manage?", "answer": "Credit, market (VaR), liquidity (LCR>100%), operational, conduct, and regulatory capital."}] - **Ch5: Tech & Innovation** (SECONDARY) - Purpose: $17B tech spend highlights: LLM Suite, COIN, Athena, Onyx blockchain, and $10T daily payments. - Type: public - Color: #117ACA - is_sticky: false - image_url: jp/blockchain.png - hide_on_homepage_feed: true - hide_highlights: true - Description:

63,000 technologists power COIN (360k lawyer hours saved), Athena risk platform, and Onyx JPM Coin settlements.

LLM Suite rolled out 2024; Fusion Data on AWS/Google Cloud.

Countering 'traditional bank' perception with aggressive innovation.

- Tabs: ["Articles", "Pages"] - initial_tab: Articles - default_role: Reader - FAQ: [{"question": "What is LLM Suite?", "answer": "Internal AI for summarisation, research, code; transformative per Dimon."}, {"question": "How does Onyx work?", "answer": "Blockchain for repo/institutional settlement with JPM Coin stablecoin."}, {"question": "Tech hiring programs?", "answer": "Analyst Programme rotations in Palo Alto, Bangalore, Warsaw."}] ### 3. CONTENT CALENDAR **3 is_main_highlight articles total** (high-signal: earnings, acquisition, HQ). **Ch1: CIB Markets & Deals** (PRIMARY, 3 articles; 1 sticky, 1 highlight) - FY2024 CIB Revenue: ~$59B – Strong Markets, #1 League Tables (announcement; tags: ['fy2024', 'cib', 'league-tables', 'markets']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true). Body outline: Earnings breakdown, fixed income/FX volumes, client wins. - First Republic Integration: $173B Loans Absorbed, West Coast Wealth Expansion (recap; tags: ['first-republic', 'acquisition', 'awm', 'integration']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true). Body: FDIC deal details, capital impact. - Q4 Mandates Surge: M&A Advisory Fees Up on Recovery (milestone; tags: ['ma', 'ib', 'mandates', 'coverage']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false). **Ch2: Chase Consumer Banking** (PRIMARY, 3 articles; 1 sticky) - Sapphire Reserve Milestone: Redefining Premium Travel Cards (spotlight; tags: ['ccb', 'credit-cards', 'sapphire', 'consumer']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false). Body: 86M customers, branch/ATM stats. - CCB Growth: $60B Revenue on Higher NII, Digital Adoption (recap; tags: ['fy2024', 'ccb', 'revenue', 'digital']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true). - Small Business Banking Expansion: 30K CB Clients Referred (guide; tags: ['cb', 'small-business', 'treasury', 'lending']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false). **Ch3: Leadership Voice** (PRIMARY, 3 articles; 2 sticky, 1 highlight) - Jamie Dimon Annual Letter 2024: Fortress Balance Sheet Amid Geopolitics (leadership; tags: ['dimon', 'annual-letter', 'strategy', 'risk']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true). Body: Key quotes, economy views. - MD Promotions Class of 2024: 327 Across 42 Countries (milestone; tags: ['promotions', 'md', 'careers', 'talent']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true). - Return to Office Policy: 5-Day Requirement Firm-Wide (policy; tags: ['roo', 'office', 'culture', 'hybrid']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: true; notify: true). **Ch4: Compliance & Risk** (SECONDARY, 2 articles; 1 sticky, 1 highlight, both read-confirm) - Information Barrier Policy: Mandatory Chinese Walls Acknowledgement (policy; tags: ['compliance', 'mnpi', 'barriers', 'training']; is_main_highlight: true; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: true; notify: true). Body: Exact policy details from profile. - Fed Stress Test 2024: CET1 Strong, No Capital Restrictions (regulatory; tags: ['stress-test', 'dfast', 'capital', 'risk']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: true; notify: false). Body: Results, living will. **Ch5: Tech & Innovation** (SECONDARY, 2 articles; 1 sticky) - LLM Suite Rollout: AI Access for All 316K Employees (announcement; tags: ['llm', 'ai', 'tech', 'innovation']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: true; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: true). Body: Use cases, Dimon quote. - Onyx Blockchain: $10T Payments, JPM Coin Milestones (recap; tags: ['onyx', 'blockchain', 'payments', 'fintech']; is_main_highlight: false; is_sticky: false; require_read_confirmation: false; notify: false). ### 4. HUB-LEVEL POLISH - **company_name**: JPMorgan Chase & Co. - **website_name**: JPMorganChase.com - **default_language**: en-US - **supported_languages**: ["en-US"] - **login_quick_links**: [{"text": "Careers", "url": "https://careers.jpmorgan.com"}, {"text": "Investor Relations", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/ir"}, {"text": "Newsroom", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/news-stories"}, {"text": "Annual Report", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/annual-report"}, {"text": "Business Principles", "url": "https://www.jpmorganchase.com/about/governance/business-principles"}] - **sidebar_navigation**: ["collaborators", "documents", "approvalRequests", "learning", "workgroups", "ideation"] (client coverage first, then docs/risk, talent dev) This is a complete design. Shall I build it end-to-end, or would you like to adjust anything first — channel names, article plan, colors, or hub settings?
